mission.title: opentelemetry: Add OpenTelemetry project roadmap
mission.description: Add OpenTelemetry project roadmap . Requested by 8+ users.

steps.title: Check current opentelemetry deployment
steps.description:
Verify your opentelemetry version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n opentelemetry -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry
helm list -n opentelemetry 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working opentelemetry installation.

steps.title: Review opentelemetry configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant opentelemetry configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n opentelemetry -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry
kubectl get configmap -n opentelemetry -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=opentelemetry
```
In my discussions with end-users and developers, a question I get asked often is about the OpenTelemetry roadmap, release plan and what's in development.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Add OpenTelemetry project roadmap
steps.description:
This is an attempt to catalog existing workstreams and combine this with the [results of the roadmap brainstorming sessions that we held at the last two Kubecon events](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1jt47KPwgDG_-4kR4J5GtFSCEhQO3CHgUdAwpCKTQHO8/edit#), so that we can better broadcast the project's major workstreams and releases to community members and to the people who use or follow OpenTelemetry.

Please comment and propose edits as your see fit!

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n opentelemetry -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry
kubectl get events -n opentelemetry --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Add OpenTelemetry project roadmap " is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: This is an attempt to catalog existing workstreams and combine this with the [results of the roadmap brainstorming sessions that we held at the last two Kubecon events](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1jt47KPwgDG_-4kR4J5GtFSCEhQO3CHgUdAwpCKTQHO8/edit#), so that we can better broadcast the project's major workstreams and releases to community members and to the people who use or follow

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with opentelemetry installed or the issue environment reproducible.
